}

sparql:
SELECT ?company ?founder ?exactAge ?companyLabel ?founderLabel WHERE {
  VALUES ?company {
    wd:Q312 wd:Q21198 wd:Q44300 wd:Q918
  }
  ?company wdt:P112 ?founder ; wdt:P571 ?founded .
  ?founder wdt:P569 ?birth .
  ?company rdfs:label ?companyLabel .
  ?founder rdfs:label ?founderLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?companyLabel) = "en" && LANG(?founderLabel) = "en")
  .
  BIND(YEAR(?founded) AS ?foundedYear)
  BIND(MONTH(?founded) AS ?foundedMonth)
  BIND(DAY(?founded) AS ?foundedDay)
  BIND(YEAR(?birth) AS ?birthYear)
  BIND(MONTH(?birth) AS ?birthMonth)
  BIND(DAY(?birth) AS ?birthDay)
  BIND(IF(?foundedMonth > ?birthMonth ||(?foundedMonth = ?birthMonth && ?foundedDay >= ?birthDay) ,(?foundedYear - ?birthYear) ,(?foundedYear - ?birthYear - 1)) AS ?exactAge)
}
ORDER BY ?company ?founder

sparql:
SELECT ?country ?countryLabel(AVG(?turnout) AS ?averageTurnout) WHERE {
  ?country wdt:P31 wd:Q6256 .
  ?country wdt:P463 wd:Q41550 .
  ?country rdfs:label ?countryLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?countryLabel) = "en")
  ?election wdt:P17 ?country ; wdt:P585 ?date ; wdt:P1868 ?ballotsCast ; wdt:P1867 ?eligibleVoters .
  FILTER(xsd:integer(?eligibleVoters) > 0)
  BIND(xsd:float(?ballotsCast) AS ?balls)
  BIND(xsd:float(?eligibleVoters) AS ?eligible)
  BIND(?balls / ?eligible * 100 AS ?turnout)
  BIND(YEAR(?date) AS ?year)
  FILTER(?year >= YEAR(NOW ()) - 10 && ?year <= YEAR(NOW ()))
}
GROUP BY ?country ?countryLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?averageTurnout)

  ?city wdt:P17 wd:Q38 .
  ?city wdt:P31 / wdt:P279 * wd:Q515 .
  ?city wdt:P1082 ?pop .
  ?city wdt:P2046 ?area .
  ?city rdfs:label ?cityLabel .
